reviews.review_title: I ain’t tryna be that guy
reviews.review_description: I’m sorry to ask but may I have stick I have experience with it in a famous shut down game now called Omni taggers. I’m on this game a lot but sadly lost discord to my parents I just figured I ask for a chance, if u need me to clarify just send me a request and I will show u, great game and great community but I’ve seen some bad monkers but no one was there. Overall tho I’m pretty well known my user is TbtMesa but with that out of the way 5 star game easily.

I think it was hacked bc I went in there and it said this game is full of viruses n****rs
And I thought  is this game hacked or did any devs do it
    

If any devs see this dm me

Long arms, infinite shiny rocks, updates every week, thats the good part, until i saw this guy, and he lied about someone saying the N word, and reported them, when nobody including me heard it, so we reported him, and he spammed the report button on EVERYONE and put his name to KINGOFSLAVERY, and im American so i find it offensive. Good features, but bad community, 2 stars.
Change it back to gorilla tag

This game is quite literally the best gorilla tag fan game I’ve ever played. reviews.review_title: Best Gtag fan game ever made
reviews.review_description: Ever since the k-id update came along I was all alone no one to play with but when I saw this game I was saved and I love the fact that you have over a billion shiny rocks and everything is for 1000 shiny rocks it is amazing I also like that it is the old gorilla tag because i never got a chance to play it

This is one of the best games I have played. I play it every day and I enjoy the game extremely, it's super fun and I recommend playing it, as it has one of the best communities I have seen and you will definitely meet a moderator in the first week of playing so I hope you enjoyed reading my review and I hope this helps!
